title: senna humifusa
intro: Senna humifusa, also known as the yellow trefoil or round leaved cassia, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Senna humifusa has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and laxative effects, which are attributed to its high content of anthraquinones. The health benefits of Senna humifusa include the treatment of constipation, as well as its potential use in reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Herbal preparations of Senna humifusa can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
